purpose: Official first-wave contact channels for sending ZRC-ND Phase A RFQ outbox bundles.

contacts.source_note: Official contact page lists contact form and 510-964-9000 for quotes and testing requests.
contacts.send_note: Use the contact form first; ask whether the Phase A package can be handled as non-GLP exploratory physicochemical testing.

contacts.vendor_name: MilliporeSigma Cell Culture Media Stability and Testing Services
contacts.source_note: Official offices/contact page lists U.S. customer service, technical service, and Process Solutions technical/commercial service contacts.
contacts.send_note: Use the service page/contact path first; ask to route the RFQ to cell culture media stability/testing or Process Solutions custom testing.

contacts.source_note: Official contact page lists info@osmolab.com and 385.323.5141; submission page says to request a quote before sending samples.
contacts.send_note: Ask explicitly whether acellular neural-medium aliquots from regenerated-cellulose module exposures fit their sample policy and whether conductivity is available.

contacts.source_note: Official contact page lists info@jordilabs.com, 508-966-1301, and contact form.
contacts.send_note: Use as chemistry/E&L escalation or custom analytical feasibility; do not over-scope before Phase A identifies a chemical drift concern.

contacts.vendor_name: Intertek China Healthcare and Medical Device Testing
contacts.source_note: Official China contact path should be used to route the RFQ to healthcare, materials, or medical-device testing; exact pH/osmolality/conductivity coverage must be confirmed.
contacts.send_note: Use as APAC split-scope fallback; require run_id-level raw values and non-GLP exploratory scope.

contacts.source_note: Use official contact routing for medical-device testing or chemistry/biocompatibility feasibility; do not assume Phase A media-panel coverage until technical review.
contacts.send_note: Best as chemistry/E&L or biological escalation path after Phase A identifies material-blank risk.

contacts.vendor_name: TUV SUD China Medical Device Testing
contacts.source_note: Use official China contact routing for medical-device testing or biocompatibility; exploratory Phase A scope requires confirmation.
contacts.send_note: Use as second-wave regulatory/ISO route; ask whether non-GLP raw run_id-level testing can be scoped separately.

contacts.vendor_name: PONY Testing Medical Device and Life-Science Services
contacts.source_note: Use official site inquiry path to route custom medical-device or physicochemical testing; exact Phase A fit must be confirmed.
contacts.send_note: Use as China-local broad screening fallback only if the response commits to raw sample-level values and source-file provenance.

non_evidence_boundary: Contact details and vendor responses are sourcing artifacts only. They do not count as material evidence until real returned measurements pass LIMINA QC.
